meaning: adj.肥皂一般的,起着泡沫的
examples: I tossed my husband's dishes into the sudsy water.
Don't use plasticor paper throw-away products and do dishes together out of a sudsy bucket usinggreen dishwashing soap.
Fox knocked some snow off his window and dipped a rag into a bucket of sudsy water. "I think it's because the snow doesn't stick to Windows when they are clean," said Fox.
You can also enter a message -- the app suggests a reason for the sudsy gift or maybe a suggested meeting place and time -- and it will appear in a tweet.
